steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Left of the blank: a scuba diving club is a noun phrase. Right of the blank: that is the oldest club for Black divers... is a dependent relative clause.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule for restrictive relative clauses
steps.content:
A restrictive relative clause is directly attached to its head noun without a comma. Club that is correctly applies this rule.

Options B and C violate it by inserting punctuation between the noun and the clause; option D disrupts the structure by adding and.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
